annotations.annotation: Regulations .01—.02 adopted as an emergency provision effective January 1, 2000 (27:2 Md. R. 142); adopted permanently effective April 17, 2000 (27:7 Md. R. 707)
Regulation .01 amended effective May 4, 2009 (36:9 Md. R. 654)
Regulation .02 amended effective May 4, 2009 (36:9 Md. R. 654)
Regulation .02B, C amended effective June 5, 2006 (33:11 Md. R. 952)
Regulation .02D amended effective March 31, 2003 (30:6 Md. R. 423); June 5, 2006 (33:11 Md. R. 952)
Regulation .02E amended effective June 5, 2006 (33:11 Md. R. 952)
Regulations .01—.02 repealed effective January 7, 2013 (39:26 Md. R. 1666)
